home: Pour your pint, capture the line, then get scored. Browse feed, wall, and leaderboards today.
feed: Pours, pub walls, and Thailand Guinness headlines in one stream.
competitions: Join public listings or host private challenges. Invite friends by email and track live standings.
competitionsOpenListings: Listings summarize members, timing, and current leaders. Tap through to join, invite friends, and pour.
competitionDetail: Standings update live as members submit. Invite friends from Profile or share this competition now.
leaderboard: Weekly ranked splits from the whole community. Tap any row to open pours and details.
profile: Manage profile details, avatar, and friends list. Invite people by email and join competitions together.
pubs: Explore venues behind community pours worldwide. Search names, cities, or countries to find great bars.
faq: How scoring works, what the app includes (feed, pubs, competitions), accounts, and how to support the project.
wall: Sort, filter scores and dates across pours. Tap tiles for venues, photos, and split results.
